name: experiment_2026-04-22_router_cycle40
description: PR-5 cycle40 base profile for the detector_config WFO sweep. Same shape as router_v5a — default sl14_tf60_35 (aggressive), bear-trend + volatile -> sl6_tr30_tp6_tf60_35 (defensive). detector_config is intentionally left empty so the WFO grid can sweep TrendADXMin × VolatileATRPercentMin via parameterGrid override paths and discover thresholds at which the detector emits more than just bull-trend on LTC 15m.
